testcase.name: test_parse_cookie_string
testcase.failure:
def test_parse_cookie_string(): cookie_string = "key1=value1; key2=value2; kuaishou_key=value3" > cookiejar, is_cn = BaseGen.parse_cookie_string(cookie_string) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_kling.py:89: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cookie_string = 'key1=value1; key2=value2; kuaishou_key=value3'
@staticmethod def parse_cookie_string(cookie_string): cookie = SimpleCookie() cookie.load(cookie_string) cookies_dict = {} cookiejar = None is_cn = False for key, morsel in cookie.items(): if key.startswith("kuaishou"): is_cn = True cookies_dict[key] = morsel.value > cookiejar = cookiejar_from_dict( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ cookies_dict, cookiejar=None, overwrite=True ) E NameError: name 'cookiejar_from_dict' is not defined
kling/kling.py:86: NameError

testcase.name: test_get_account_point[ImageGen]

gen_class = <class 'kling.kling.ImageGen'> mock_session = <test_kling.mock_session.<locals>.MockCurl object at 0x1036001a0>

kling/kling.py:21: TypeError

testcase.name: test_call_for_daily_check

failure.message: TypeError: functions are not supported for this option

testcase.failure:
def test_call_for_daily_check(): mock_session = MagicMock() mock_session.perform() > result = call_for_daily_check(mock_session, True) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_kling.py:160: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
cookie = <MagicMock id='4351598208'>, is_cn = True
def call_for_daily_check(cookie: str, is_cn: bool) -> bool: buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() if is_cn: c.setopt(c.URL, f"{base_url}api/pay/reward?activity=login_bonus_daily") else: c.setopt(c.URL, f"{base_url_not_cn}api/pay/reward?activity=login_bonus_daily")
> c.setopt(c.COOKIE, cookie) E TypeError: functions are not supported for this option
kling/kling.py:27: TypeError
